footer.tagline: A diversified company across fuel technology, healthcare, premium coffee, and logistics.

cookieBanner.message: We use essential cookies to keep the site working, and optional analytics cookies to improve it.

home.title: Vitorra Holdings Limited — Fuel, Logistics, Healthcare & Coffee
home.description: Vitorra is a diversified company providing Fuel Eco Tech, logistics, SEAL Wound Spray, and premium Ugandan coffee across Uganda and East Africa.

overview.eyebrow: Vitorra Holdings Limited · Uganda & East Africa
overview.body: A diversified company delivering Fuel Eco Tech, logistics, healthcare products, and premium coffee across Uganda, East Africa, and international markets.

fet.body: Reducing fuel consumption and extending engine life for commercial fleets across East Africa.

seal.body: Clinical-grade hemostatic wound control for hospitals, emergency responders, and military procurement.

coffee.headlineLead:
Premium Ugandan coffee.
Farm to cup.
coffee.body: Traceable, responsibly sourced coffee for consumers, hospitality businesses, and international importers.

logistics.body: End-to-end freight, warehousing, customs clearance, and supply chain management across Uganda, East Africa, and beyond.

authority.body: Every certification is externally issued — not self-declared. FET has been verified by the institutions that the industry trusts.
authority.footnote: All certifications are externally issued and independently audited. No self-certification.

fet.body: FET is a patented, ISO-certified fuel optimisation system — validated by AVL Technologies and trusted by fleet operators across East Africa. No engine modification. Measurable ROI.
fet.proof1: Patented swirl chamber — improves oxygen integration on every cycle
fet.proof2: Independently validated by AVL Technologies automotive lab
fet.proof3: ISO 9001 · ISO 14001 · ISO 27001 certified · Zurich Product Liability

suite.title: More from Vitorra.
suite.cta: Request a quote for any product
suite.sealDescription: Clinically validated hemostatic wound spray for hospitals, emergency responders, NGOs, and military procurement.
suite.coffeeTagline: Premium Ugandan coffee. Farm to cup.
suite.coffeeDescription: Traceable, responsibly sourced coffee for consumers, hospitality businesses, and international importers.
suite.logisticsDescription: End-to-end freight, warehousing, customs clearance, and supply chain management across Uganda and East Africa.

why.body: From fuel efficiency to emergency medicine, premium coffee to end-to-end logistics — Vitorra serves businesses that demand proven performance, not promises.
why.point1Body: Every FET installation is benchmarked before and after — so the savings are in data, not marketing copy.
why.point2Body: ISO 9001 · 14001 · 27001, Zurich-insured, AVL-validated. Our products carry independent international certification.
why.point3Body: Serving Uganda and six markets across the region — with the infrastructure and local knowledge to grow alongside you.

finalCta.body: Whether you need a fuel savings assessment, a logistics quote, or premium Ugandan coffee — our team responds within 24 hours.
finalCta.caption: Uganda · East Africa · International  ·  Typical reply within 24 hours

certCard.body: Vitorra Holdings Limited is a registered Ugandan company, backed by verified certifications, lab results, and third-party validations across every product line.

team.teaserBody: A company is only as strong as its people — led by Solomon Okello, with a team spanning operations, finance, marketing, and technology.

testimonials.title: Proven in the field.
testimonials.subtitle: Independent test data from a signed official report — real vehicle, real conditions, verified results.
testimonials.bigNumberCaption: fuel consumption reduction — first full month after FET installation.
testimonials.vehicleLine: VW T5 · Landesbaubehörde Stadthagen, Germany · Tested January–October 2025 under standard service conditions.
testimonials.savingCallout: ↓ 1.60 l/100 km saved · 13,468 km baseline · Verified result
testimonials.finding1: No further limp-mode incidents after installation
testimonials.finding2: EGR and DPF blockages eliminated completely
testimonials.finding3: Smoother, more stable engine behaviour throughout
testimonials.attribution: Report prepared by CTI GmbH & Landesbaubehörde Hameln · Signed by Holger Walprecht, Lippstadt · 10 November 2025
